channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: How is Israel replicating its Gaza tactics in Lebanon?
item.description: Widespread Israeli attacks on civilian targets in Lebanon are a repeated tactic from Gaza.

item.title: Trumps says Iran can play at World Cup in US after FIFA confirmation
item.description: FIFA chief Gianni Infantino has said Iran will play their World Cup matches, leading to agreement from US President.

item.title: US-Venezuela direct flights resume after seven-year suspension
item.description: The first direct US-Venezuela commercial flight in seven years departed Miami for Caracas on Thursday.

item.title: RSF condemns ‘kidnapping’ of three journalists on board Gaza aid flotilla
item.description: Among the detained journalists are Al Jazeera correspondent Hafed Mribah and cameraman Mahmut Yavuz.

item.title: US passes law to resume DHS funding and end partial government shutdown
item.description: Trump signs funding measure, which excludes ICE, ending weeks-long crisis that left many federal workers without pay.

item.title: Uganda court sentences man to death for killing four children at nursery
item.description: Christopher Okello Onyum sentenced for fatal stabbing of four children aged between one and three years old.

item.title: Trump says Tennessee next to redistrict after US Voting Rights Act ruling
item.description: Ruling weakening Voting Rights Act opens door to more states redrawing maps, diluting voting power of minority groups.

item.title: Mexico’s Sheinbaum questions US claims of drug ties to Sinaloa governor
item.description: US prosecutors unsealed an indictment charging Ruben Rocha and nine others over alleged Sinaloa cartel links.

item.title: Iran will play World Cup games in US according to FIFA chief Infantino
item.description: Iran's place at the US cohosted 2026 event has been in doubt since the US-Israeli war on their country.

item.title: Piracy rises off Somalia as US-Israeli war on Iran diverts naval forces
item.description: More than a dozen sailors, mostly from Pakistan, are being held by Somali pirates as hijackings and harassment surge.

item.title: Lebanese girl mourns paramedic father killed in Israeli strike
item.description: A young girl in Lebanon joined hundreds mourning her father, one of three paramedics killed in an Israeli attack.

item.title: Myanmar’s former leader Aung San Suu Kyi moved to house arrest
item.description: The move comes as part of a larger prisoner pardon tied to a Buddhist religious holiday.

item.title: UN chief calls for immediate reopening of the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: UN Secretary-General António Guterres has urged the immediate reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: UAE exit signals OPEC’s declining grip on oil markets
item.description: Chris Weafer says the UAE's OPEC exit leaves the organisation less influential on global oil pricing.

item.title: US falls to ‘historic low’ in press freedom tracker: RSF
item.description: Reporters Without Borders warns of 'press freedom crisis' in US amid media consolidation, Trump policies.

item.title: Israel rights group petitions top court to order release of 14 Gaza doctors
item.description: Physicians for Human Rights-Israel accuses authorities of hindering the rehabilitation of Gaza's healthcare system.

item.title: Trump slams Germany’s Merz again as rift over Iran war widens
item.description: Berlin says 'prepared' for fewer US troops, as Trump says German chancellor should focus on European affairs, not Iran.

item.title: How rebels teamed up to shake Mali and the Kremlin’s grip
item.description: Bamako woke to explosions as JNIM and Tuareg rebels attacked nationwide, killing Mali’s defence minister. Why now?

item.title: Africa and Asia back Infantino for unique fourth term as FIFA president
item.description: Confederations back Gianni Infantino's run in 2027 to remain head of football's global governing body.

item.title: Saudi Arabia to end LIV Golf funding, while league appoints new chairman
item.description: League says it wants to move towards an investment model involving multiple partners and team franchises.

item.title: Iran, protests, human rights – all to know about the 76th FIFA Congress
item.description: The pre-World Cup congress will be headlined by geopolitical tensions, human rights concerns and logistical issues.

item.title: From railways to energy — five strategic projects linking Gulf states
item.description: In the face of worsening geopolitical tensions, Gulf nations are resuming cooperative projects aimed to mitigate risks

item.title: ‘Act of piracy’: World reacts to Israeli interception of Gaza aid flotilla
item.description: Officials around the globe condemn the interception of the boats bound for Gaza as violation of international law.

item.title: Lindsey Vonn not ready to decide if she’ll ski again after Olympics crash
item.description: US racer Lindsey Vonn crashed out of her comeback at the 2026 Winter Olympics, and revealed she feared leg amputation.

item.title: US military equipment worth billions of dollars destroyed in Iran war
item.description: The United States lost aerial equipment worth up to $2.8bn, according to a US-based think tank.
